response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, plus open-source leadership through GISCollective. However, this is a Director-level Principal Engineer role centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows only recent, limited AI exposure (MCP code generators and agentic tooling at current role since April 2025). There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI products at scale, cloud-platform strategy work, advising strategic customers, or operating at director-level IC scope. Tenure totals approach the 15-year bar but lack the leadership-of-leaders signal expected at this level.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack engineer with 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of req/sec)
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective) demonstrating product ownership, Kubernetes deployment, and sustained technical leadership
Strong software-craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus a track record of teaching (workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise — only brief MCP/agentic tooling work in the past ~14 months; no shipped AI products or platforms
No evidence of director-level IC scope: advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product future-state, or influencing across organizations
Cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK at Optilyz); lacks the broad cloud-platform strategy depth implied by the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / AI products
Broad engineering depth and OSS product ownership
